title: The Friendly Squirrel
description: A story about a friendly squirrel who loves to share.

localizedDescription.en: A story about a friendly squirrel who loves to share.
localizedDescription.pl: Opowieść o przyjaznej wiewiórce, która uwielbia się dzielić.
localizedDescription.es: Una historia sobre una ardilla amigable a la que le encanta compartir.
localizedDescription.de: Eine Geschichte über ein freundliches Eichhörnchen, das gerne teilt.
localizedDescription.fr: A story about a friendly squirrel who loves to share.

pages.text: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.

localizedText.en: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.pl: Dawno, dawno temu żyła sobie przyjazna mała wiewiórka o imieniu Sammy.
localizedText.es: Había una vez una pequeña ardilla amigable llamada Sammy.
localizedText.de: Es war einmal ein freundliches kleines Eichhörnchen namens Sammy.
localizedText.fr: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.it: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.pt: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.ja: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.ar: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.tr: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.nl: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.da: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.la: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.
localizedText.zh: Once upon a time, there was a friendly little squirrel named Sammy.

pages.text: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.

localizedText.en: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.pl: Sammy uwielbiał zbierać żołędzie w jesiennym lesie.
localizedText.es: A Sammy le encantaba recolectar bellotas en el bosque de otoño.
localizedText.de: Sammy liebte es, im Herbstwald Eicheln zu sammeln.
localizedText.fr: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.it: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.pt: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.ja: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.ar: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.tr: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.nl: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.da: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.la: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.
localizedText.zh: Sammy loved to collect acorns in the autumn forest.

pages.text: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.

localizedText.en: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.pl: Pewnego dnia Sammy spotkał głodnego królika, który nie miał jedzenia.
localizedText.es: Un día, Sammy conoció a un conejo hambriento que no tenía comida.
localizedText.de: Eines Tages traf Sammy einen hungrigen Hasen, der kein Essen hatte.
localizedText.fr: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.it: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.pt: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.ja: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.ar: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.tr: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.nl: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.da: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.la: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.
localizedText.zh: One day, Sammy met a hungry rabbit who had no food.

pages.text: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.

localizedText.en: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.pl: "Proszę, weź trochę moich żołędzi" -powiedział Sammy z uśmiechem.
localizedText.es: "Aquí, toma algunas de mis bellotas" -dijo Sammy con una sonrisa.
localizedText.de: "Hier, nimm ein paar von meinen Eicheln" -sagte Sammy mit einem Lächeln.
localizedText.fr: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.it: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.pt: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.ja: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.ar: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.tr: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.nl: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.da: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.la: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.
localizedText.zh: "Here, take some of my acorns," said Sammy with a smile.

pages.text: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.

localizedText.en: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.pl: Królik był taki szczęśliwy! Zostali najlepszymi przyjaciółmi.
localizedText.es: ¡El conejo estaba muy feliz! Se convirtieron en los mejores amigos.
localizedText.de: Der Hase war so glücklich! Sie wurden die besten Freunde.
localizedText.fr: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.it: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.pt: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.ja: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.ar: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.tr: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.nl: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.da: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.la: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.
localizedText.zh: The rabbit was so happy! They became the best of friends.

pages.text: Sharing makes everyone happy. The End.

localizedText.en: Sharing makes everyone happy. The End.
localizedText.pl: Dzielenie się sprawia, że wszyscy są szczęśliwi. Koniec.
localizedText.es: Compartir hace feliz a todos. Fin.
localizedText.fr: Sharing makes everyone happy. The End.
